hints.HAMLET: Danish prince who soliloquizes about being or not being
hints.MACBETH: Scottish lord whose ambition leads to murder
hints.LEAR: Aging king who divides his kingdom among his daughters
hints.VIOLA: Twelfth Night heroine who disguises as a man
hints.ROSALIND: Heroine of As You Like It who flees to the forest
hints.BEATRICE: Quick-witted heroine of Much Ado About Nothing
hints.PORTIA: Wealthy heroine of The Merchant of Venice
hints.HENRY: Name shared by multiple Shakespeare king plays
hints.RICHARD: Name shared by three Shakespeare plays about English kings
hints.JOHN: Subject of one of Shakespeare's lesser-known history plays
hints.EDWARD: English king whose play is partly attributed to Shakespeare
hints.SONNET: 14-line poem with a fixed rhyme scheme
